chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Revision Application No.S-85 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 30.10.2025 Mr.Nihal Khan Lashari, Advocate for applicant Ms.Safa Hisbani, A.P.G **** Applicant Mst.Anila Shehnaz, is present in Court and she does not wish to press this application. Same is dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
